statusLine.command: input=$(cat); dir=$(echo "$input" | sed -n 's/.*"current_dir":"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); short_dir=$(echo "$dir" | awk -F'/' '{if(NF>=3) printf "%s/%s", $(NF-1), $NF; else if(NF>1) print $NF; else print $0}'); model=$(echo "$input" | sed -n 's/.*"display_name":"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); remaining=$(echo "$input" | sed -n 's/.*"remaining_percentage":\([0-9]*\).*/\1/p'); if [ -n "$remaining" ]; then printf '%s | %s | Context: %s%%' "$short_dir" "$model" "$remaining"; else echo "$short_dir | $model"; fi
